title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 311.650 - Offices of supervisor
text:
311.650.  Offices of supervisor. — The principal office of the supervisor of liquor control shall be at the seat of government at Jefferson City, and the director of the division of facilities management, design and construction at the capitol shall provide offices for the liquor control department.
(RSMo 1939 § 4887, A.L. 2014 H.B. 1299 Revision)
